title: Directive (EU) 2022/2555 of the European Parliament and of the Council on measures for a high common level of cybersecurity across the Union, amending Regulation (EU) No 910/2014 and Directive (EU) 2018/1972, and repealing Directive (EU) 2016/1148 (NIS 2 Directive)
issuing_body: European Parliament and Council of the European Union
repeals: Directive (EU) 2016/1148 (NIS1 Directive) — with effect from 18 October 2024
amends: Regulation (EU) No 910/2014 (eIDAS) — Article 19 deleted with effect from 18 October 2024
Directive (EU) 2018/1972 (EECC) — Articles 40 and 41 deleted with effect from 18 October 2024
note: This is a directive addressed to Member States. Obligations on entities flow from national transposition laws. This model represents the substantive obligations as they must be implemented by Member States under Articles 41(1) and 41(2) (application from 18 October 2024).
